## Source: amazon-inspector (f70a37180c88f0ddd0cc94346d4bb7703667321771ecc6de6c9c74f03a77f464)

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (a93c7a3f654f6443a589bbeec7a013cfc4f478f2d86358be4252ec2e73e44433)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'experedzss' @ 1.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
